channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Tragedy at Kapiti: Six Killed in Bus-Truck Collision Involving Tahmeed Express
item.description: Tahmeed Express, a Kenyan bus company, confirmed a fatal road accident in Kapiti, Konza that claimed six lives, including its driver and a truck driver. The crash occurred shortly after midnight, with...

item.title: David Rowe's July 2026 Cartoons Published
item.description: The article highlights the release of David Rowe's latest cartoon collection, scheduled for publication in July 2026. It mentions the initial publication date of June 30, 2026, and includes details ab...

item.title: Police launch murder investigation after woman and two children are found dead near Bedford
item.description: Bedfordshire Police have launched a murder investigation after a woman and her two children were discovered dead at a property on Carnoustie Drive in Great Denham, near Bedford. Officers forced entry ...

item.title: Aarto system offers traffic fine alternatives to ease court burden
item.description: The Road Traffic Infringement Authority (RTIA) has introduced elective options under the Administrative Adjudication of Road Traffic Offences (Aarto) system to manage traffic violations without crimin...

item.title: Shanghai Grand Opera House Unveils Iconic Spiral Roof and State-of-the-Art Performing Arts Complex
item.description: The Shanghai Grand Opera House, designed by Snøhetta in collaboration with the East China Architectural Design and Research Institute, has officially opened after six years of construction. This monum...

item.title: Government Commits to Continuous Service Across All Regions
item.description: The Tanzanian government has officially denied claims that it has a set expiration date, emphasizing its stability and commitment to serving all regions without time limitations or geographical bias. ...

item.title: Tunde Kelani to honour late Kola Oyewo with special documentary episode celebrating his legacy
item.description: Veteran filmmaker Tunde Kelani has announced that an upcoming episode of his documentary series will be dedicated to the memory of the late actor, scholar and cultural icon, Gabriel Kola Oyewo. Kelani...

item.title: Kano Judiciary Disciplines Sharia Court Officials Over Corruption and Misconduct
item.description: The Kano State Judicial Service Commission has taken disciplinary action against several officials in the Sharia court system following allegations of bribery, corruption, and negligence. A senior jud...

item.title: Kenyan Man Forced to Leave South Africa After Violence Destroys 12-Year Life's Work
item.description: David Ondimu, a Kenyan man who built a successful business in South Africa over 12 years, was forced to abandon his life after anti-immigrant violence erupted. The chaos led to his family being left b...

item.title: Dar es Salaam remains calm amid heightened security measures ahead of potential protests
item.description: Dar es Salaam experienced unusually quiet conditions on Tuesday, July 7, 2026, with fewer vehicles on roads, delayed shop openings, and increased police deployment. The city's usual bustling activity ...

item.title: NSW Wind Farms Seek Financial Support Amid Construction Delays
item.description: Large-scale wind projects critical to Australia's renewable energy targets are facing significant challenges in securing funding and progressing construction. Despite their importance in helping New S...

item.title: Abbie Cornish Portrays Anna Nicole Smith in Film Based on Memoir
item.description: The article discusses the upcoming film 'Trust Me, I’m a Doctor,' starring Abbie Cornish as Anna Nicole Smith. The movie is based on the memoir of Dr. Sandeep Kapoor, who was involved in a high-profil...

item.title: Trump Announces Sanctions Lift on Turkey and F-35 Sale Decision Amid NATO Summit Tensions
item.description: US President Donald Trump has announced plans to lift sanctions on Turkey and make a decision on the potential sale of F-35 stealth jets to Ankara during a NATO summit meeting with Turkish President T...

item.title: LaSalle offers branch pickup after weekend storms
item.description: LaSalle, a municipality in Windsor, Ontario, has announced it will offer branch pickup services to residents affected by the powerful weekend storms. The decision comes as communities across the regio...

item.title: Bangladeshi national arrested in Assam for illegal entry to meet family
item.description: A 42-year-old Bangladeshi national, Sahed Ahmed, was arrested in Assam's Hailakandi district for illegally entering India to meet his wife and daughter. Police revealed that Ahmed, from Bangladesh's S...

item.title: Oyo State Police Investigate Masquerade-Linked Murder in Ibadan
item.description: The Oyo State Police Command has launched a full probe into the brutal murder of Sefiu Kehinde, a 24-year-old man who was attacked by a masquerade group in Labiran area of Ibadan. The incident occurre...

item.title: School Sanitation Initiative Completed, but Calls for National Audit to Ensure Safety
item.description: Basic Education Minister Siviwe Gwarube announced the completion of the school sanitation programme launched in 2018, marking a milestone in South Africa's efforts to provide safe sanitation for learn...

item.title: Super Typhoon Bavi Approaches Philippine Area of Responsibility
item.description: The Philippine Atmospheric, Geophysical and Astronomical Services Administration (PAGASA) has announced that Super Typhoon Bavi is expected to enter the Philippine Area of Responsibility (PAR) early W...

item.title: DOJ Resists Release of Private Epstein Communications Amid Legal Battle
item.description: The U.S. Department of Justice is opposing a government watchdog's attempt to force the release of Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche's private communications regarding Jeffrey Epstein, which were r...

item.title: Renault CEO outlines plans to stabilize Alpine F1 team and boost performance
item.description: Renault's CEO, Francois Provost, has shifted focus from long-term F1 timelines to immediate improvements for Alpine, which is currently fighting for fifth place in the constructors' standings. The tea...
